Video.summary: Fabric to Fashion is a reality show featuring designers and sewist from all over the world. Designers are given a challenge, then we follow the guests designing in their own sewing spaces. Angela Wolf mentors and guides the designers throughout each challenge, and often throws in a few extra twists!
Video.title: Fabric to Fashion Episode 2

Image.alt: Fabric to Fashion Episode 2
Fabric to Fashion Episode 2

Video.summary: Explore the mysteries and attraction of the ancient art of Tarot Cards. The cards might be centuries old but can still have an inexplicable power to help answer some of life's most important questions. In this programme we explain how to use the cards, shows the basic meaning of the pack and how to conduct a Tarot card reading. We conduct a reading and we can see for ourselves how to explain the possible card interpretations.
Video.title: An Introduction to Tarot

Image.alt: An Introduction to Tarot
An Introduction to Tarot

Video.summary: Here are some fun crafts that can be completed in 10 minutes or less... give or take a few... you might even recognize a few goldie oldies & new takes on some classics! These are great gift ideas for beginners and they won't break the bank!!

Video.summary: Beth is a busy, successful, single executive whose life consists of five-star hotels, gourmet restaurants and VIP airport lounges. But her own house, a midtown Toronto duplex, doesn't measure up. As a result, she feels more at home on the road than in her own house. Designer Samantha Pynn uses silks, metallic wallpaper, glass tabletops and mirrored doors to transform Beth's dowdy living quarters into a glamorous and luxurious space.
Video.title: Pure Design: Beth's Dining Room

Image.alt: Pure Design: Beth's Dining Room
Pure Design: Beth's Dining Room
